patterns.cause: Direct navigation to result URLs or interaction with 'I am not a robot' checkboxes.
patterns.remedy: Use Human-Flow: Home -> Type with delay -> Click results tab -> Visual selection.

patterns.symptom: Agent scrolls and resets page infinitely.
patterns.cause: Confusing visual feedback (toggles/popups) with progress. Lack of URL change validation.
patterns.remedy: Always validate state change via URL or specific unique element detection before scrolling.

patterns.symptom: Command failed with && or similar tokens.
patterns.cause: Using bash-style separators in Windows PowerShell.
patterns.remedy: Use semicolon (;) or run commands separately.
